templates.title: JSON reader — baca file JSON
templates.description: Baca file JSON dan kembalikan sebagai dict/list Python.

templates.title: JSON writer — tulis data ke file JSON
templates.description: Tulis objek Python ke file JSON dengan indentasi.
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(filepath, data, encoding="utf-8"):
    """Tulis data ke file JSON."""
    with open(filepath, "w", encoding=encoding) as f:
        json.dump(data, f, indent={{indent}}, ensure_ascii=False)
